prestazioni: Engine swap to a K24A2 (2.4L DOHC i-VTEC from the 2005-2008 Acura TSX) with a custom billet crankshaft (Manley 4340 forged) and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, paired with JE 12.5:1 compression forged pistons for high-octane tuning. Turbocharged with a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbo (0.82 A/R, 62mm inducer) on a custom Precision Turbo & Engine manifold, running 22 psi on E85 with a PRL Motorsports Stage 3 turbo kit (CR-V-specific).

Full bolt-on fuel system upgrade: Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, and a Radium Engineering dual catch can setup with AN-6 lines. ECU reflash via Hondata KPro V4 with a custom 3-bar MAP sensor calibration for the K24A2, targeting 320 whp and 280 lb-ft torque on a Dynojet 224xLC.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track CR-V-specific coilovers (8-way adjustable damping, 20mm drop), Whiteline front sway bar (24mm adjustable) and rear sway bar (22mm), paired with Hardrace adjustable rear camber arms and poly bushings. Braking upgraded to DBA 5000 Series rotors with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Goodridge G-Stop stainless steel brake lines.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works CR-V widebody kit (2019+ Touring-specific fitment) with custom carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, painted in BASF RM Diamond White with a 3M Gloss Black wrap on the roof and pillars. Front bumper replaced with a Seibon Carbon fiber Type-R-style lip and custom LED fog light delete with Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro lights.

Rear wing upgrade to a custom 9Lives Racing GTW720 wing (30mm risers, 720mm chord) mounted on a carbon fiber wing riser kit from Verus Engineering. Side skirts replaced with Rocket Bunny CR-V-specific side skirts (2019+ Touring fitment) with integrated LED side markers from VLED.

Wheel setup: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2x2 19x10.5 +25 front and 19x11.5 +35 rear, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35/19 front, 285/30/19 rear). Custom center caps with Honda Racing H logo and gold hardware. Interior: Recaro Sportster CS seats (front) with custom CR-V Touring-specific mounts, NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub, and a full Alcantara headliner with red stitching from Katzkin.
